title: 'It's a dream': Boro fans gear up for Wembley
summary: Middlesbrough fans are preparing for a match at Wembley amid excitement, though Southampton are appealing a decision that could affect Middlesbrough's participation. The outcome of the appeal remains uncertain as fans gear up for the fixture.
content: Middlesbrough fans say they are in a dream, but the Saints are appealing the decision.

zh.title: "这是一个梦想"：博罗球迷为温布利做准备
zh.summary: 米德尔斯堡球迷正在为温布利球场的比赛做准备，充满兴奋，但南安普顿正在上诉一项可能影响米德尔斯堡参赛资格的决定。上诉的结果仍不确定，球迷们为这场比赛做好准备。

title: Rotherham appoint McClaren to head of football role
summary: Rotherham United have appointed former England manager Steve McClaren to a newly-created head of football position. The move comes as the club works to rebuild following their recent relegation to League Two.
content: Former England boss Steve McClaren takes up a newly-created role as head of football at Rotherham, recently relegated to League Two.

zh.title: 罗瑟汉姆任命麦克拉伦担任足球总监
zh.summary: 罗瑟汉姆联队任命英格兰前主教练史蒂夫·麦克拉伦担任新创建的足球总监职位。此举是该俱乐部在最近降入第二级别联赛后重建的一部分。

title: Wrexham star wants Championship play-offs restart
summary: Wrexham are monitoring the Southampton spygate scandal and may consider legal action depending on developments. The club is assessing the implications before deciding on their next steps regarding the controversy.
content: Wrexham are monitoring the Southampton spygate scandal before considering any potential legal action.

zh.title: 雷克瑟姆球星要求英冠附加赛重新开始
zh.summary: 雷克瑟姆正在关注南安普顿"间谍门"丑闻，可能会根据事态发展考虑采取法律行动。该俱乐部正在评估影响，然后决定是否对这一争议采取进一步步骤。

title: Man Utd-Forest referee not selected for final day
summary: The referee who officiated Manchester United's victory over Nottingham Forest has been excluded from final-day Premier League fixtures. The decision raises questions about referee selection protocols following the controversial match.
content: The referee for Manchester United's win over Nottingham Forest last Sunday has not been selected for any match in the final round of Premier League fixtures.

zh.title: 曼联对森林队比赛裁判未被选中参加最后一天的比赛
zh.summary: 执法曼联战胜诺丁汉森林比赛的裁判已被排除在英超最后一天的比赛之外。这一决定引发了人们对有争议比赛后裁判选择协议的质疑。

title: What tactics might Alonso use at Chelsea?
summary: Newly-appointed Chelsea manager Xabi Alonso is expected to bring a possession-based tactical approach to Stamford Bridge next season. Analysts are examining how his system will adapt to Premier League football.
content: What tactical approach will Xabi Alonso bring to Stamford Bridge next season after being announced as Chelsea boss?

zh.title: 阿隆索在切尔西可能使用什么战术？
zh.summary: 新任命的切尔西主教练哈维·阿隆索预计将在下赛季为斯坦福桥带来以控球为主的战术体系。分析人士正在研究他的方法如何适应英超足球。

title: Xhaka makes fourth Switzerland World Cup squad
summary: Granit Xhaka has been selected for Switzerland's World Cup squad, marking his fourth consecutive World Cup appearance. The Sunderland midfielder's inclusion underscores his status as a key player for the national team.
content: Sunderland's Granit Xhaka will take part in his fourth successive World Cup after being included in the Switzerland squad for this summer's tournament.

zh.title: 哈卡入选瑞士第四次世界杯阵容
zh.summary: 格拉尼特·哈卡已被选入瑞士世界杯阵容，这是他连续第四次入选世界杯。这位桑德兰中场球员的入选彰显了他作为国家队关键球员的地位。

title: Emslie recalled by Scotland five months after giving birth
summary: Scotland have recalled forward Claire Emslie for Women's World Cup qualifiers against Israel just five months after giving birth. Her return demonstrates both her commitment and the team's confidence in her recovery.
content: Scotland have recalled Claire Emslie for next month's Women's World Cup qualifying double-header against Israel, five months on from the forward giving birth.

zh.title: 埃姆斯利在产后五个月被苏格兰召回
zh.summary: 苏格兰前锋克莱尔·埃姆斯利在产后五个月被召回，代表球队参加对以色列的女足世界杯预选赛。她的回归展现了她的承诺和球队对她恢复情况的信心。

title: World Cup player signs petition calling for protection from extreme heat
summary: Norway midfielder Morten Thorsby has joined a petition urging FIFA to strengthen protections against extreme heat for World Cup players. He argues that insufficient measures harm player welfare and the sport globally.
content: Norway midfielder Morten Thorsby says "everybody in football loses" if Fifa does not do more to protect players from extreme heat at the World Cup.

zh.title: 世界杯球员签署请愿书呼吁保护运动员免受极端炎热
zh.summary: 挪威中场莫滕·托尔斯比加入了一份请愿书，敦促国际足联加强对世界杯球员的极端高温保护措施。他辩称措施不足会危害球员福利和全球足球运动。

title: Empty rooms and Fifa cancellations - US hotels fear World Cup washout
summary: US hotels are expressing concerns that the 2026 FIFA World Cup may not generate the expected tourism boom, with reports of empty rooms and cancellations affecting the hospitality sector. The economic impact on the country's tourism industry appears at risk.
content: The 2026 Fifa World Cup was supposed to provide a tourism boom for the United States, but now the fear is that may never materialise.

zh.title: 空房和国际足联取消 - 美国酒店担心世界杯泡汤
zh.summary: 美国酒店表示担忧，2026年FIFA世界杯可能无法带来预期的旅游热潮，报告显示酒店房间空置和取消预订情况影响酒店业。该国旅游业的经济影响面临风险。

title: Wrexham fan given football ban for using homophobic slurs at Chelsea match
summary: A 29-year-old Wrexham supporter has been given a football ban following sentencing for homophobic chants during the FA Cup match against Chelsea. The case highlights ongoing efforts to address discriminatory behavior in stadiums.
content: Sion Yaxley, 29, is sentenced for chants made prior to Wrexham taking on Chelsea in the FA Cup.

zh.title: 雷克汉姆球迷因在切尔西比赛中发表仇恨同性恋言论被禁赛
zh.summary: 一名29岁的雷克汉姆球迷因在足总杯对阵切尔西的比赛中发表仇恨同性恋的言论而被判足球禁赛。该案例突显了体育场内解决歧视性行为的持续努力。

title: Quiz: Can you name every Europa League winner?
summary: With Aston Villa and Freiburg set to contest the Europa League final on Wednesday, this quiz tests fans' knowledge of all previous tournament winners. The quiz comes as the competition reaches its climax.
content: As Aston Villa and Freiburg prepare to meet in Wednesday's Europa League final, we ask: Can you name all the previous winners?

zh.title: 测验：你能说出所有欧罗巴联赛冠军吗？
zh.summary: 随着阿斯顿维拉和弗赖堡即将在周三举行欧罗巴联赛决赛，这个测验考查球迷对历届锦标赛冠军的了解。这个测验恰逢赛事高潮之际推出。

title: Ranking the best European trophy-winning managers
summary: Unai Emery is poised to win his fifth Europa League title on Wednesday, putting him among history's most successful European trophy-winning managers. His record places him in rare company in continental competition.
content: Unai Emery has the chance to win a fifth Europa League on Wednesday, but where does he rank among the best European trophy winners?

zh.title: 最佳欧洲杯赛冠军得主经理人排名
zh.summary: 乌奈·埃梅里有望在周三赢得他的第五个欧罗巴联赛冠军，这将使他跻身历史上最成功的欧洲杯赛冠军得主经理人之列。他的成就在欧洲赛事中属罕见之举。

title: Dowman becomes youngest Premier League title winner
summary: Sixteen-year-old midfielder Max Dowman has become the youngest Premier League title winner as Arsenal secure the league championship. The teenage prospect's achievement marks another milestone in Arsenal's successful campaign.
content: Sixteen-year-old midfielder Max Dowman claims another record as Arsenal clinch the Premier League title.

zh.title: 道曼成为英超最年轻冠军
zh.summary: 16岁的中场球员麦克斯·道曼成为英超历史上最年轻的冠军获得者,阿森纳获得了联赛冠军。这位年轻前景的成就标志着阿森纳成功赛季的又一个里程碑。

title: After firing Man City to title - is Shaw best striker in WSL history?
summary: Khadija Shaw guided Manchester City to the Women's Super League title, raising questions about her legacy among the division's greatest strikers.
content: After Khadija Shaw helped Manchester City win the Women's Super League with another superb season, BBC Sport looks at where she stands among the division's greatest strikers.

zh.title: 带领曼城夺冠后 - 肖是女超历史最佳前锋吗？
zh.summary: 卡迪亚·肖带领曼城赢得女超联赛冠军，引发了人们对她在该联赛最伟大前锋中地位的疑问。

title: Scotland boss Clarke set for new deal until Euro 2028 - gossip
summary: Scotland head coach Steve Clarke is expected to sign a contract extension through Euro 2028, while Hearts pursue Hearts winger Calvin Miller in the transfer market.
content: Scotland head coach Steve Clarke is set to sign a new contract, while Hearts plan a summer move for Falkirk winger Calvin Miller.

zh.title: 苏格兰主帅克拉克有望签约至2028年欧洲杯

title: Pitch invasions 'a bad look' - but Clarke praises Tartan Army
summary: Coach Steve Clarke criticized pitch invasions in domestic matches as damaging Scottish football's image, though he commended the Tartan Army for maintaining discipline.
content: National head coach Steve Clarke says fans spilling on to the pitch to celebrate in domestic games is "a bad look" for Scottish football but praises the Tartan Army for avoiding such scenes.

zh.title: 冲场"不体面" - 但克拉克赞扬了苏格兰军团
zh.summary: 主教练史蒂夫·克拉克批评国内比赛中的冲场行为损害了苏格兰足球的形象，但他对苏格兰军团保持纪律的表现表示赞扬。

title: A just or harsh punishment? Reaction to Southampton expulsion
summary: Southampton has been expelled from the playoff race after admitting they spied on three league rivals, marking a significant punishment for the violation.
content: Southampton will be playing in the Championship next season after they were expelled from the play-offs following their admission that they spied on three league rivals this season.

zh.title: 是公正还是严厉的惩罚?对南安普顿开除的反应

title: Emery denies Euro king talk but Villa boss could be crowned again

content: Aston Villa are aiming to end a 30-year trophy drought in Istanbul on Wednesday.

title: After so many near-misses, Arsenal finally get it ...
summary: Arsenal have won their first Premier League title in over 20 years, finally ending a long championship drought. The achievement caps off years of competitive campaigns that came up short in previous seasons.
content: Finally! After waiting more than 20 years to be crowned Premier League champions again, Arsenal can now lay the ghosts of the past few seasons to rest.

zh.title: 经历多次遗憾后，阿森纳终于成功了
zh.summary: 阿森纳赢得了20多年来首个英超冠军，终于结束了长期的冠军荒。这一成就凝聚了多年竞争性赛季的结果，在这些赛季中球队未能最终夺冠。

title: After 8,060-day drought, Arsenal are deserved Prem...
summary: Arsenal have clinched their first Premier League title in 22 years, ending an 8,060-day championship drought. The historic achievement comes after years of near-misses and competitive disappointment.
content: null

zh.title: 经历8060天的荒漠期后，阿森纳当之无愧地赢得英超
zh.summary: 阿森纳在22年来首次赢得英超冠军，结束了8060天的冠军荒。这一历史性成就来自多年的遗憾和竞争上的失利之后。

title: 'So much on the line' - Spurs struggles sets up final day relegation decider
summary: Tottenham's poor finishing has left them in a desperate fight for Premier League survival heading into the final day of the season. West Ham also faces relegation as both teams battle to avoid dropping to the Championship.
content: Joe Hart and Danny Murphy discuss how Tottenham's lack of clincal finishing saw them miss an opportunity to secure Premier League safety and analyse who will avoid relegation with Spurs and West Ham in danger of going down on the final day of the Premier League season.

zh.title: "关系重大" - 热刺困境为最后一天保级大战奠定基础
zh.summary: 热刺的糟糕战绩使他们在英超最后一天面临绝望的保级之战。西汉姆联也面临降级威胁，两支球队都在努力避免降入英冠。

title: Spygate explainer: Why Southampton were booted fro...
summary: Southampton were expelled from the Championship playoff final after being found guilty of spying, just days before the match was scheduled to take place. The unprecedented punishment has raised serious questions about competition integrity.
content: Southampton were preparing for the Championship playoff final until the league ruled them guilty of spying and expelled them days before the game. What did they do, and where do we go from here?

zh.title: 间谍门解释：南安普顿为何被逐出锦标赛季后赛
zh.summary: 南安普顿因被判犯有间谍罪而被驱逐出锦标赛季后赛决赛，这发生在比赛原定举行前几天。这一前所未有的惩罚引发了对竞赛诚信的严重质疑。

title: Runners up no more - How Arsenal's patience paid off with Arteta
summary: Arsenal's decision to give manager Mikel Arteta time has been vindicated with their first Premier League title in 22 years, secured after Manchester City's draw with Bournemouth. The long-term faith in his project has finally paid off.
content: Speaking on Match of the Day, Danny Murphy and Joe Hart praise Arsenal for giving Mikel Arteta time after he guided the club to their first Premier League title in 22 years, following Manchester City's 1-1 draw with Bournemouth.

zh.title: 不再是亚军 - 阿森纳对阿尔特塔的耐心如何得到回报
zh.summary: 阿森纳对经理米克尔·阿尔特塔给予时间的决定得到了证实，他们赢得了22年来首个英超联赛冠军，在曼城与伯恩茅斯战平后锁定。对他计划的长期信任终于得到了回报。
